attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCPS.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID,
SCPS.SS_CODE,
NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY SCPS

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON (   NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPS.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
       AND NSOB.SS_CODE = 'EMEA' )

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH    NJEB
ON (NJEB.JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_NAME LIKE TRIM(SCPS.BATCH_NAME)||'%')

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
ON (NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT = NJEB.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT
     AND NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
ON (NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT    = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  
     AND NJEL.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID = CAST(SCPS.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID  AS VARCHAR(30))
   )

WHERE EXISTS

(   
 SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX WK
  WHERE WK.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID = SCPS.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
  AND  WK.SS_CD = SCPS.SS_CODE 
)

SELECT
	PROCESS_HISTORY_ID ,
	TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID ,
	ATTRIBUTE_ID ,
	RECORD_TYPE ,
	SOURCE_ID ,
	REQUEST_ID ,
	STATUS ,
	INTERFACE_ID ,
	RULE_ID ,
	MODEL_ID ,
	SET_OF_BOOKS_ID ,
	ACCOUNTING_DATE ,
	TRANSACTION_CLASS ,
	CATEGORY ,
	SOURCE ,
	CURRENCY_CODE ,
	SEGMENT1 ,
	SEGMENT2 ,
	SEGMENT3 ,
	SEGMENT4 ,
	SEGMENT5 ,
	SEGMENT6 ,
	SEGMENT7 ,
	SEGMENT8 ,
	SEGMENT9 ,
	SEGMENT10 ,
	SEGMENT11 ,
	SEGMENT12 ,
	SEGMENT13 ,
	SEGMENT14 ,
	SEGMENT15 ,
	ENTERED_DR ,
	ENTERED_CR ,
	ENTERED_EXCH_RATE ,
	ACCOUNTED_DR ,
	ACCOUNTED_CR ,
	ACCOUNTED_EXCH_RATE ,
	BATCH_NUMBER ,
	MODEL_CTL_ID ,
	TAX_REGISTRATION_ID ,
	ROUNDING_AMOUNT ,
	ENTERED_ROUNDING_AMOUNT ,
	TARGET_INSTANCE_ID ,
	SOURCE_ACTIVITY ,
	ATTRIBUTE1 ,
	ATTRIBUTE2 ,
	ATTRIBUTE3 ,
	ATTRIBUTE4 ,
	ATTRIBUTE5 ,
	ATTRIBUTE6 ,
	ATTRIBUTE7 ,
	ATTRIBUTE8 ,
	ATTRIBUTE9 ,
	ATTRIBUTE10 ,
	PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	ICS_FLAG ,
	CREATION_DATE ,
	CREATED_BY ,
	LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
	LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
	LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME ,
	'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
	'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_BV ST
WHERE ST.SOURCE_ID IN (19,26)
	AND NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX WK
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX WIAT
       ON (WK.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID = WIAT.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
                AND  WK.SS_CD = WIAT.SS_CODE
               )
	WHERE WK.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = ST.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID
	  AND WK.SS_CD = 'BV'
	)

SELECT
	PROCESS_HISTORY_ID ,
	TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID , 
	ATTRIBUTE_ID ,
	RECORD_TYPE ,
	SOURCE_ID ,
	REQUEST_ID ,
	STATUS ,
	INTERFACE_ID ,
	RULE_ID ,
	MODEL_ID ,
	SET_OF_BOOKS_ID ,
	ACCOUNTING_DATE ,
	TRANSACTION_CLASS , 
	CATEGORY , 
	SOURCE ,
	CURRENCY_CODE ,
	SEGMENT1 ,
	SEGMENT2 ,
	SEGMENT3 ,
	SEGMENT4 ,
	SEGMENT5 ,
	SEGMENT6 ,
	SEGMENT7 ,
	SEGMENT8 ,
	SEGMENT9 ,
	SEGMENT10 ,
	SEGMENT11 ,
	SEGMENT12 ,
	SEGMENT13 ,
	SEGMENT14 ,
	SEGMENT15 ,
	ENTERED_DR ,
	ENTERED_CR ,
	ENTERED_EXCH_RATE ,
	ACCOUNTED_DR , 
	ACCOUNTED_CR , 
	ACCOUNTED_EXCH_RATE , 
	BATCH_NUMBER , 
	MODEL_CTL_ID , 
	TAX_REGISTRATION_ID , 
	ROUNDING_AMOUNT , 
	ENTERED_ROUNDING_AMOUNT , 
	TARGET_INSTANCE_ID , 
	SOURCE_ACTIVITY ,
	ATTRIBUTE1 ,
	ATTRIBUTE2 ,
	ATTRIBUTE3 ,
	ATTRIBUTE4 ,
	ATTRIBUTE5 ,
	ATTRIBUTE6 ,
	ATTRIBUTE7 ,
	ATTRIBUTE8 ,
	ATTRIBUTE9 ,
	ATTRIBUTE10 ,
	PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	ICS_FLAG ,
	CREATION_DATE ,
	CREATED_BY ,
	LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
	LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
	LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME ,
	'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
	'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_CG1 ST
WHERE ST.SOURCE_ID IN ( 16, 19, 26)
  AND NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX WK
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX WIAT
	ON (WK.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID = WIAT.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
    	          AND  WK.SS_CD = WIAT.SS_CODE
	         )
	WHERE WK.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = ST.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID
	  AND WK.SS_CD = 'CG'
	)

SELECT
ICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY         ,
ICAT.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID         ,
ICAT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             ,
ICAT.PARTNER_OWNER_TYPE_CD         ,
ICAT.ACCOUNTING_DT                 ,
ICAT.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT     ,
ICAT.SS_CD                         ,
ICAT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY  ,
ICAT.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   ,
ICAT.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
ICAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               ,
ICAT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
ICAT.BK_IC_ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD ,
ICAT.RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT      ,
ICAT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
ICAT.RU_CREDIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,
ICAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
ICAT.RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT       ,
ICAT.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
ICAT.RU_DEBIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT    ,
ICAT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
ICAT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
ICAT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
ICAT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
ICAT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT   ,
ICAT.VT_GL_BATCH_NAME                 ,
ICAT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE                 , 
(CASE WHEN NICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
	SMICA.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY,
	SCPS_CG1.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID AS EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	CAST((CASE WHEN (SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_CR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_CR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'CREDIT'
	WHEN (SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_DR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_DR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'DEBIT' 
	END) AS VARCHAR(6)) AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ,
	SCAR_CG1.ENTITY_TYPE AS PARTNER_OWNER_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DT ,
	SCPH_CG1.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
	CAST('CG' AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CD ,
	NICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
	CAST( -999 AS INTEGER) AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
	CAST( -999 AS INTEGER)  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
	'UNK' AS BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
	CAST(-999  AS INTEGER) AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	SCAR_CG1.RULE_NAME AS BK_IC_ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCPH_CG1.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CAST(COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) AS INTEGER) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCTA_CG1.TARGET_ACCT_CURRENCY AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	NICT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
	SCPS_CG1.BATCH_NAME AS VT_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    SCPH_CG1.ATTRIBUTE_ID AS EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID 
FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_CG1 SCPH_CG1
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS SCTA_CG1
	ON (SCTA_CG1.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCPH_CG1.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	AND SCTA_CG1.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	) 
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES SCAR_CG1
	ON (SCPH_CG1.RULE_ID = SCAR_CG1.RULE_ID
	AND SCPH_CG1.SOURCE_ID= SCAR_CG1.SOURCE_ID
	AND SCAR_CG1.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	) 

	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NICT
	ON ( NICT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCPH_CG1.INTERFACE_ID
	AND NICT.SS_CD = 'CG'
	AND NICT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID = SCPH_CG1.ATTRIBUTE_ID
	AND SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT1 = (CASE WHEN SCAR_CG1.ENTITY_TYPE = 'OWNER' THEN NICT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD              
								  WHEN SCAR_CG1.ENTITY_TYPE = 'PARTNER' THEN NICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD END)
	 AND (CASE WHEN  NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES' THEN 19 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX' THEN 26 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF' THEN 16 END) = SCPH_CG1.SOURCE_ID
	)

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY SCPS_CG1
	ON (SCPH_CG1.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID=SCPS_CG1.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
	AND SCPS_CG1.SS_CODE = 'CG') 


	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX SMICA
	ON ( SMICA.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = SCPH_CG1.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID
	AND SMICA.SS_CD = 'CG'
	)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON ( NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPS_CG1.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
	AND NSOB.SS_CODE = 'EMEA' )

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
	ON (NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON ( NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT1
	AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT2
	AND NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT3
	AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT4
	AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT5
	AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT6
	AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND NGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
	) 
WHERE  SCPH_CG1.SOURCE_ID IN ( 16, 19, 26)

UNION ALL

SELECT
	SMICA.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY,
	SCPS_CG1.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID AS EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	CAST((CASE WHEN (SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_CR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_CR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'CREDIT'
	WHEN (SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_DR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_DR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'DEBIT' 
	END) AS VARCHAR(6))  AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ,
	SCAR_CG1.ENTITY_TYPE AS PARTNER_OWNER_TYPE_CD ,
      SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DT ,
	SCPH_CG1.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
	CAST('CG' AS VARCHAR(8))  AS SS_CD ,
	NICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
	CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
	CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
	'UNK' AS BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
	CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	SCAR_CG1.RULE_NAME AS BK_IC_ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCPH_CG1.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CAST(COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) AS INTEGER) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	SCPH_CG1.ACCOUNTED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCTA_CG1.TARGET_ACCT_CURRENCY AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_CG1.ENTERED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	NICT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
	SCPS_CG1.BATCH_NAME AS VT_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    SCPH_CG1.ATTRIBUTE_ID AS EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID 	
FROM
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_CG1 SCPH_CG1
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS SCTA_CG1
	ON (SCTA_CG1.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCPH_CG1.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID
	AND SCTA_CG1.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	) 
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES SCAR_CG1
	ON (SCPH_CG1.RULE_ID = SCAR_CG1.RULE_ID
	AND SCPH_CG1.SOURCE_ID= SCAR_CG1.SOURCE_ID
	AND SCAR_CG1.SS_CODE = 'CG'
	) 

	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NICT
	ON ( NICT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCPH_CG1.INTERFACE_ID
	AND NICT.SS_CD = 'CG'
	AND NICT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID = SCPH_CG1.ATTRIBUTE_ID
	AND SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT1 = (CASE WHEN SCAR_CG1.ENTITY_TYPE = 'OWNER' THEN NICT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD              
								  WHEN SCAR_CG1.ENTITY_TYPE = 'PARTNER' THEN NICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD END)
	 AND (CASE WHEN  NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES' THEN 19 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX' THEN 26 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF' THEN 16 END) = SCPH_CG1.SOURCE_ID
	)

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY SCPS_CG1
	ON (SCPH_CG1.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID=SCPS_CG1.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
	AND SCPS_CG1.SS_CODE = 'CG') 


	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX SMICA
	ON ( SMICA.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = SCPH_CG1.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID
	AND SMICA.SS_CD = 'CG'
	)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON ( NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPS_CG1.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
	AND NSOB.SS_CODE = 'EMEA' )

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
	ON (NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON ( NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT1
	AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT2
	AND NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT3
	AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT4
	AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT5
	AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE = SCPH_CG1.SEGMENT6
	AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND NGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
	) 
WHERE  SCPH_CG1.SOURCE_ID IN ( 16, 19, 26)
) ICAT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX NICAT
ON (ICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY = NICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY)

SELECT 
(RANK() OVER (ORDER BY IQ.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,IQ.SS_CD) + SM.MAX_KEY) AS IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY,
SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(
SELECT  
PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
'QTC'  AS SS_CD
FROM        $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_QTC
UNION ALL
SELECT  
PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT     ,
'BV'  AS SS_CD
FROM        $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_BV
UNION ALL
SELECT  
PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
'CG'  AS SS_CD
FROM        $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_CG1
UNION ALL
SELECT  
PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
'SJ'  AS SS_CD
FROM        $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_SJ
) IQ,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_KEY
  FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX
 ) SM
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1
   FROM    $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX ICAT
   WHERE ICAT.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = IQ.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT
         AND ICAT.SS_CD = IQ.SS_CD
 )

SELECT
ICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY         ,
ICAT.EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID         ,
ICAT.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             ,
ICAT.PARTNER_OWNER_TYPE_CD         ,
ICAT.ACCOUNTING_DT                 ,
ICAT.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT     ,
ICAT.SS_CD                         ,
ICAT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY  ,
ICAT.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   ,
ICAT.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT ,
ICAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               ,
ICAT.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
ICAT.BK_IC_ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD ,
ICAT.RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT      ,
ICAT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
ICAT.RU_CREDIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,
ICAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
ICAT.RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT       ,
ICAT.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
ICAT.RU_DEBIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT    ,
ICAT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
ICAT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
ICAT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
ICAT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
ICAT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT   ,
ICAT.VT_GL_BATCH_NAME                 ,
ICAT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE                 , 
(CASE WHEN NICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT
	SMICA.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY, 
	SCPS_BV.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID AS EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	CAST((CASE WHEN (SCPH_BV.ENTERED_CR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_CR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'CREDIT'
	 WHEN (SCPH_BV.ENTERED_DR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_DR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'DEBIT' 
	END) AS VARCHAR(6)) AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ,
	SCAR_BV.ENTITY_TYPE AS PARTNER_OWNER_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DT ,
	SCPH_BV.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
	CAST('BV' AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CD ,
	NICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
	CAST( -999 AS INTEGER) AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
	CAST( -999 AS INTEGER)  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
	'UNK' AS BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
	CAST( -999 AS INTEGER)  AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	SCAR_BV.RULE_NAME AS BK_IC_ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCPH_BV.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ENTERED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CAST( COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) AS INTEGER)  AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCTA_BV.TARGET_ACCT_CURRENCY AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ENTERED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	NICT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
	SCPS_BV.BATCH_NAME AS VT_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    SCPH_BV.ATTRIBUTE_ID AS EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_BV SCPH_BV

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS SCTA_BV
		ON (SCTA_BV.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCPH_BV.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID
		AND SCTA_BV.SS_CODE = 'BV'
		) 

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES SCAR_BV
		ON (SCPH_BV.RULE_ID = SCAR_BV.RULE_ID
		AND SCPH_BV.SOURCE_ID= SCAR_BV.SOURCE_ID
		AND SCAR_BV.SS_CODE = 'BV'
		) 

	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NICT
		ON ( NICT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCPH_BV.INTERFACE_ID
		AND NICT.SS_CD = 'BV'
		AND NICT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID = SCPH_BV.ATTRIBUTE_ID
		AND SCPH_BV.SEGMENT1 = (CASE WHEN SCAR_BV.ENTITY_TYPE = 'OWNER' THEN NICT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD              
									 WHEN SCAR_BV.ENTITY_TYPE = 'PARTNER' THEN NICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD END)
	 AND (CASE WHEN  NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES' THEN 19 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX' THEN 26 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF' THEN 16 END) = SCPH_BV.SOURCE_ID
		/*AND NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES'*/
		)

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY SCPS_BV
		ON (SCPH_BV.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID=SCPS_BV.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
		AND SCPS_BV.SS_CODE = 'BV') 

	 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX SMICA
		ON ( SMICA.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = SCPH_BV.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID
		AND SMICA.SS_CD = 'BV'
		)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
		ON ( NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPS_BV.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE = 'EMEA' )

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
		ON (NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)
	 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
		ON ( NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT1
		AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT2
		AND NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT3
		AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT4
		AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT5
		AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT6
		AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
		AND NGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
		AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
		) 
WHERE SCPH_BV.SOURCE_ID IN ( 19,26)

UNION ALL

SELECT
	SMICA.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY, 
	SCPS_BV.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID AS EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID ,
	CAST((CASE WHEN (SCPH_BV.ENTERED_CR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_CR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'CREDIT'
	 WHEN (SCPH_BV.ENTERED_DR IS NOT NULL AND SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_DR IS NOT NULL) THEN 'DEBIT' 
	END) AS VARCHAR(6)) AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ,
	SCAR_BV.ENTITY_TYPE AS PARTNER_OWNER_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS ACCOUNTING_DT ,
	SCPH_BV.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID AS SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT,
	CAST('BV' AS VARCHAR(8)) AS SS_CD ,
	NICT.INTERCOMPANY_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
	CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
	CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT, 
	'UNK' AS BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
	CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	SCAR_BV.RULE_NAME AS BK_IC_ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCPH_BV.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ENTERED_CR AS RU_CREDIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CAST(COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) AS INTEGER)  AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	SCPH_BV.ACCOUNTED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
	SCTA_BV.TARGET_ACCT_CURRENCY AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
	SCPH_BV.ENTERED_DR AS RU_DEBIT_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	NICT.EP_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
	SCPS_BV.BATCH_NAME AS VT_GL_BATCH_NAME,
    SCPH_BV.ATTRIBUTE_ID AS EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID 	
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY_BV SCPH_BV

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_TARGET_ASSIGNMENTS SCTA_BV
		ON (SCTA_BV.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID = SCPH_BV.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID
		AND SCTA_BV.SS_CODE = 'BV'
		) 

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES SCAR_BV
		ON (SCPH_BV.RULE_ID = SCAR_BV.RULE_ID
		AND SCPH_BV.SOURCE_ID= SCAR_BV.SOURCE_ID
		AND SCAR_BV.SS_CODE = 'BV'
		) 

	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_TRX NICT
		ON ( NICT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCPH_BV.INTERFACE_ID
		AND NICT.SS_CD = 'BV'
		AND NICT.EP_ATTRIBUTE_ID = SCPH_BV.ATTRIBUTE_ID
		AND SCPH_BV.SEGMENT1 = (CASE WHEN SCAR_BV.ENTITY_TYPE = 'OWNER' THEN NICT.OWNER_COMPANY_CD              
									 WHEN SCAR_BV.ENTITY_TYPE = 'PARTNER' THEN NICT.PARTNER_COMPANY_CD END)	
	 AND (CASE WHEN  NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES' THEN 19 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'CUST_TRX' THEN 26 
		WHEN NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'VT_IF' THEN 16 END) = SCPH_BV.SOURCE_ID
		/*AND NICT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'LINES'*/
		)

	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY SCPS_BV
		ON (SCPH_BV.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID=SCPS_BV.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
		AND SCPS_BV.SS_CODE = 'BV') 

	 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX SMICA
		ON ( SMICA.SK_PROCESS_HISTORY_ID_INT = SCPH_BV.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID
		AND SMICA.SS_CD = 'BV'
		)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
		ON ( NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = SCPS_BV.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE = 'EMEA' )  
		
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
		ON (NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = NSOB.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)
	 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
		ON ( NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT1
		AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT2
		AND NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT3
		AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT4
		AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT5
		AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE = SCPH_BV.SEGMENT6
		AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
		AND NGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
		AND NGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT = NCOA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
		) 
WHERE SCPH_BV.SOURCE_ID IN ( 19,26)
) ICAT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INTERCOMPANY_ACCOUNTING_TRX NICAT
ON (ICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY = NICAT.IC_ACCOUNTING_TRX_KEY)
